---
title: "HDR Thesis"
---

In 2022, I received my Habilitation to Supervise Research (HDR) from Université Clermont Auvergne.

## HDR examination committee

**External reviewers (rapporteurs)**

- **Tanguy Bernard**, Professor, Université de Bordeaux, Bordeaux Sciences Économiques
- **Stéphane Blancard**, Professor, AgroSup Dijon, CESAER
- **Raja Chakir**, Research Director, INRAE, Paris-Saclay Applied Economics

**Committee members**

- Catherine Araujo Bonjean, Research Fellow, CNRS, CERDI
- Vianney Dequiedt, Professor, Université Clermont Auvergne, CERDI

My HDR thesis, *La durabilité des systèmes de production agricole dans les pays en développement* \[Sustainability of agricultural production systems in developing countries\], brings together my work on sustainable agriculture in China, land use and deforestation in Brazil, climate risks, environmental governance, and ecosystem services.

The manuscript is written in French.

[Download the HDR thesis (PDF)](files/hdr-thesis.pdf){.btn .btn-primary}
